user.title: Ted's View Assist
user.description: Installs and updates the Ted's View Assist dashboard, views, sentence blueprints, and backgrounds from GitHub. View Assist must be installed and configured first.

init.title: Ted's View Assist
init.description: Change the GitHub source used to install and update assets.

install_all.name: Install all
install_all.description: Download and install all changed Ted's View Assist assets.

force.name: Force
force.description: Reinstall every asset even if its version is unchanged.

install_asset.name: Install asset
install_asset.description: Install a single asset class, optionally one named view or blueprint.

asset_class.name: Asset class
asset_class.description: The type of asset to install.

name.name: Name
name.description: Optional view name or sentence group (omit to install the whole class).

check_updates.name: Check for updates
check_updates.description: Re-check the repository for a newer release.
